band_rules.role: all supporting sources, receipts, validators, applications, and external comparators

multi_slot_rule: Assign every item to all matching slot families. Primary slot is the highest scoring family; secondary slots remain active routes for obligations, comparators, and workbook/application material.

families.generalized_meaning: closure, lift, aggregate receipt, prestate declaration, and open-slot preservation
families.method_use: define scope, axioms, receipts, and what is allowed to advance
families.physics_use: declare the domain-local prestate, conservation/closure boundary, and calibration burden

families.generalized_meaning: first active enumeration, carrier identity, and address-preserving object creation
families.method_use: define the local object and prove the addressed state exists
families.physics_use: identify the physical object/state space being translated and its observables

families.generalized_meaning: correction, residue, vacancy, mismatch, error term, or unresolved delta
families.method_use: separate exact finite result from residue and obligation
families.physics_use: assign residuals, uncertainty, missing variables, or unmodeled interaction terms

families.generalized_meaning: fold, representation transport, coordinate atlas, and symmetry/readout conversion
families.method_use: show how the same state is preserved across representations
families.physics_use: map accepted mathematical representations into observer-state coordinates

families.generalized_meaning: boundary repair, admissibility, interface condition, curvature or constraint demand
families.method_use: type the boundary condition that permits the next state
families.physics_use: define physical boundary/interface conditions and repair constraints

families.generalized_meaning: carrier, path, traversal, transport, propagation, and state motion
families.method_use: show how state moves without losing address
families.physics_use: translate propagation, transport, mass/field carriers, or path integrals

families.generalized_meaning: causal ledger, link binding, obligation bookkeeping, and synchronization
families.method_use: track receipts, dependencies, and causal relations
families.physics_use: track interaction ledgers, conservation accounting, detector/readout timing, or causal chains

families.generalized_meaning: bridge, projection, calibration surface, and cross-form sample preservation
families.method_use: connect discrete, analog, computational, and continuous versions
families.physics_use: define units, calibration maps, measurement adapters, and comparator equations

families.generalized_meaning: terminal lookup, address closure, invariant split, and stable library object
families.method_use: make a reusable lookup or invariant object
families.physics_use: define lookup-ready constants, stable phases, invariant classes, or terminal observables

families.generalized_meaning: window, observer readout, meta-frame, timing, and next-lift preplot
families.method_use: define the readout window and route the next lift
families.physics_use: define observer frame, measurement window, time-scale, or domain handoff

families.generalized_meaning: orbital synthesis, clean-master presentation, cross-paper evidence routing, and publication assembly
families.method_use: route material across multiple slots without pretending the overlay is the proof owner
families.physics_use: coordinate multi-domain physics rebuilds, figures, indexes, appendices, and synthesis obligations
